message:
fix: findCommonHooks intersection and RequiredUnless validation (gt-zt8df, gt-b8wh1)

findCommonHooks now collects candidate entries from ALL targets instead
of only targets[0], computing a proper intersection. Previously, entries
present in all targets but missing from the first were silently dropped.

validateConvoy now verifies that each RequiredUnless entry references
a valid input key, catching typos at parse time instead of runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
